generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are quietly shifting their defense budgets to prioritize domestic needs? While they cut back, we're left holding the bag for collective security. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation—it's about ensuring we're not left vulnerable when others can't (or won't) contribute their fair share. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
